not_applicable_exceptions.reason: The reviewed intent binds the complete three-case Showcase scope and its deterministic local proof commands; it makes no changed Agent-behavior claim.
This tracked contract binds the complete v1.12.0 Diff to deterministic proofs and explicitly declares no changed Agent behavior or governance adoption.
The Skill adds an explicit route to the bounded Repository Audit Showcase while preserving default-off activation and human publication authority.
The new reference documents only the three commit-locked static cases, evidence boundaries, runtime scope, and mandatory human review state.
The module change is the package version declaration only and makes no claim about changed Agent behavior.
The CLI adds three explicit repository-case aliases and preserves legacy path audit behavior; deterministic tests cover dispatch and invalid combinations.
The new static repository auditor is deterministic, read-only, Evidence First, bounded by locked profiles, and never executes upstream code or tests.
